name: Elif Balkas
background: Dr. Elif Balkas joined Wolfspeed in 2006 and has served as Chief Technology Officer since 2022. She previously served as Vice President of R&D and has held various leadership roles in the company's materials and power business units.

company_affiliations.name: Wolfspeed, Inc. (formerly Cree, Inc.)
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Various roles including Director of Research and Development, Materials
